source.metricName: Zillow Home Value Index for all homes, middle tier, seasonally adjusted
source.disclosure: Typical home values are modeled estimates, not recorded sale prices, listing prices, or an MLS feed.
source.transferDatasetName: DataSF Assessor Historical Secured Property Tax Rolls
source.transferDisclosure: Dots are residential parcels with a public current-sales recording date. The public bulk data does not include sale price or deed type, so some dots may be non-market transfers.
